# FaceOverlay

> FaceOverlay is a native macOS webcam overlay app by Kuip Limited. It keeps a live camera window floating above the desktop for presentations, demos, tutorials, screen sharing, and video calls.

## Summary

FaceOverlay is designed for people who want their webcam visible while sharing a Mac screen without using a full streaming or production setup. It provides a lightweight floating camera overlay that can be positioned above other windows during presentations and recordings.

## Primary Use Cases

- Product demos
- Developer walkthroughs
- Educational videos
- Sales calls
- Design reviews
- Founder updates
- General screen sharing with a visible presenter camera

## Platform

- macOS

## Core Features

- Floating webcam overlay window
- Resizable and movable camera view
- Camera selection
- Image mirroring
- Adjustable opacity
- Adjustable corner roundness
- Optional shadow
- Optional always-on-top mode
- Optional desktop-following behavior across Spaces
- Background blur

## Product Positioning

FaceOverlay is a focused utility rather than a full broadcasting platform. It is meant to help Mac users stay visually present while showing their screen.

## Company

- Developer: Kuip Limited

## Official Links

- Website: https://faceoverlay.kuip.co.uk
- Mac App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6762126517
- Privacy Policy: https://faceoverlay.kuip.co.uk/privacy
